tweet:
shipped a website refresh and a new media upload service. added grok-imagine support and custom voice IDs for elevenlabs.

also taught the video pipeline to handle rejection (better rate limit fallbacks).

14 PRs merged.
alt_tweet:
new website coat of paint, finally.

also shipped persistent media uploads, grok-imagine support, and custom voice IDs.

fixed the video generation logic so it falls back gracefully when APIs get tired. 14 PRs today.
image_prompt: [Cozy pixel art scene of renovation and storage]. Polly the bee painting a large retro browser window with a lime green (#ecf874) roller. The chunky robot companion is stacking glowing floppy disks (media storage) nearby. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'FRESH PAINT'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
reasoning: Leads with the visible change (website) then hits the functional value (uploads, new models). 'Handle rejection' adds the dry humor/personification of code required by the persona.
